Request Demo

Internet at the
Speed of Visible Light.

Replace overcrowded radio waves with multi-gigabit optical wireless. Zero electromagnetic leakage — pure, physically contained broadband through your ceiling lights.

Explore Hardware Request a Demo
10 Gbps
Peak Throughput
Zero RF
EM Signature
100%
Physical Containment
LIVE SCHEMATIC

Optical Data Transfer Flow — How LiFi Works

101101001010
DATA RECEIVED

1. Fiber Ingress

High-speed fiber feeds data into the optical driver controller.

2. LED Modulation

Driver modulates LED at MHz frequencies — imperceptible to the eye.

3. Photon Beam Transmission

A focused light cone carries gigabits per second downward.

4. Photodetector Decode

USB dongle or embedded sensor reconstructs the data stream.

Real-World Deployment

LiFi in Every Environment

From home ceilings to operating theatres — wherever there is light, there is internet.

🏢
Smart Office

LED ceilings beam gigabits to every desk

Ceiling luminaires transmit dedicated data cones to each workstation. No shared radio channel — every seat gets a private optical link.

Hardware Solutions
Ceiling
Floor Level — Connected Devices
Smart Office
Signal Physics · Room-Level Comparison

See the Difference Inside a Room

Toggle between WiFi and LiFi to see how signal propagation differs at the architectural level.

LiFi: Optical Wireless

Signal BoundaryStrictly contained within walls
SpectrumVisible & IR — unlicensed, uncongested
InterferenceZero co-channel noise
SecurityPhysical layer prevents eavesdropping
SpeedUp to 10 Gbps per beam
Performance Benchmarks

Direct Architectural Metrics

Attribute
LiFi · Optical
WiFi · Radio
Data Rate
≤ 10 Gbps per beam
≤ 9.6 Gbps (shared, Wi-Fi 6E)
Security
Physical boundary, no external intercept
Broadcasts — packet sniffing possible
EM Jamming
100% immune — uses light, not RF
Highly susceptible in dense areas
Bandwidth Pool
1,000× larger unlicensed spectrum
Congested, heavily regulated bands
Coverage
Room-focused targeted beams
Facility-wide broad range
Installation
Replaces/augments existing LED fixtures
Requires separate radio hardware
Frequency Scalability

Light Unlocks a 1,000× Wider Channel

The visible light spectrum gives LiFi thousands of times more transmission space than the entire radio dial combined.

Radio

Radio

3 Hz – 300 GHz

Congested

Microwave

Microwave

300 MHz – 300 GHz

Regulated

Infrared

Infrared

300 GHz – 400 THz

400 THz – 700 THz

1000× Wider
